case_title: SANIDAD, DAVID J. vs. CLOSESTS AND MORE 'DESIGNS BY PAT TAFFER'

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANIDAD, DAVID J. AS TO DEFENDANT CLOSESTS AND MORE 'DESIGNS BY PAT TAFFER'
